questions.text: Can you describe a situation in your life where two people had different views because of something they sawg on television or the internet? What happened?
If you compare films or TV shows from the past with those today, do they show society differently? In what ways?
To what extent do you think social media influences what is shown in traditional media, such as television?.
Do you think media and social media influences how people behave? Can you give examples from your country?
Do you think news media in your country is objective and truthful? Are there any issues that it tends to highlight or ignore?
Should media creators be truthful in the content they produce? Is this the same for journalists, documentary makers, and social media influencers?
What responsibility do individuals have when sharing information online?
Should documentaries be completely factual, or should they present a particular point of view? Why?
